subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! These are Thy servants who have acknowledged the Word of Thy Oneness and confessed the Manifestation of Thy peerless Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هولاء عباد اقروا بکلمه وحدانیتک و اعترفوا بظهور جمال فردانیتک عن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
